name: Fire Ant Queen
description: A unique queen deep inside the Fire Anthill. She is not a traditional combat creature, but an interactive event that reacts to the kind of Toejam Sandwich you feed her.
behavior: She remains in the heart of the anthill waiting for the player’s decision. Her reactions are not reversible within the same cycle: each offering commits you to a different route.
interactionWithPlayer: The player can feed her the tasty, poisoned, or infected Toejam Sandwich. Each one permanently changes the queen’s state, the available loot, and even the future of the anthill.
interactionWithCreatures: As long as she lives, she defines the behavior of the surrounding fire ants. Depending on the chosen route, some ants can become temporarily neutral or even be replaced by infected variants in New Game+.
strategy: This is not a reflex challenge but a choice-driven event. The tasty route favors the pet and Antbassador progress, the poisoned route opens the full corpse loot, and the infected route sets up the future Infected Ant Queen in New Game+.
specialTraits: Tasty route: grants a Baby Fire Ant, its gold card, and progress toward Antbassador; it also makes nearby fire workers and soldiers temporarily neutral while the mutation is equipped.
Poisoned route: kills the queen, lets you loot the body, and opens the cave behind her for extra resources and an exit path.
Infected route: initially looks the same as the poisoned one, but in the next New Game+ it converts her into the Infected Ant Queen and alters part of the anthill.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Not a traditional combat encounter; it functions as an interactive choice event.
